name: seqlen128_exp019
hypothesis: all 18 prior runs used seq_len=512, where the queried binding must survive ~512 tokens of decay/distractors. A shorter seq_len=128 puts the queried binding much closer to where it's stated = the EASIEST retrieval regime. If retrieval emerges at 128, decay/distance was part of the bottleneck (falsifies the structural diagnosis, reopens the search); if the plateau holds even at the easiest retrieval distance, the frozen-full-attention format-shortcut diagnosis is strongly confirmed.
